Minutes before sunset: Quelques minutes avant le coucher du soleil

Name: Nom

Manual trigger ignores all blocks: Le déclenchement manuel ignore tous les blocs

Only works if the switch reports its rea: Only works if the switch reports its real state back (acknowledged / ack=true).
